basic_details.job_title: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 15 Teaching and Support Staff Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh
basic_details.short_information: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Recruitment 2026: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh has released the official notification for 15 Various Teaching and Support Staff posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: UR:35, Female:38, BC:37, SC/ST:40, PwBD:10 years relaxation in respective category, Ex-Servicemen:5 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with 50% marks + B.Ed/JTET for Teachers, B.Com + Computer Course for Accountant, Matric for Support Staff, 8th Pass for Cooks
qualification.details: Fulltime Hindi Teacher: Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent + JTET for classes 1-8 Fulltime English Teacher: Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent Fulltime Math Teacher: Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent + JTET for classes 1-8 Fulltime Science Teacher (Biology & Chemistry): Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent + JTET for classes 1-8 Fulltime Science Teacher (Physics & Math): Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent Fulltime Social Science Teacher: Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent + JTET for classes 1-8 Fulltime Physical Education Teacher: Bachelor in Physical Education/Degree in Physical Education Fulltime Computer Teacher: BCA/BSc Computer Science or Any Graduate with 2 years diploma in computer science from AICTE recognized institute Fulltime Accountant: B.Com with 50% marks + PGDCA/DCA or equivalent + Tally Software knowledge + Typing in Hindi & English Support Staff (Orderly & Night Watchman): Matric Head Cook: 8th Pass Assistant Cook: 8th Pass

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ramgarh.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Fulltime Hindi Teacher: Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent + JTET for classes 1-8 Fulltime English Teacher: Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent Fulltime Math Teacher: Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent + JTET for classes 1-8 Fulltime Science Teacher (Biology & Chemistry): Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent + JTET for classes 1-8 Fulltime Science Teacher (Physics & Math): Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent Fulltime Social Science Teacher: Graduate with 50% marks in relevant subject + B.Ed or equivalent + JTET for classes 1-8 Fulltime Physical Education Teacher: Bachelor in Physical Education/Degree in Physical Education Fulltime Computer Teacher: BCA/BSc Computer Science or Any Graduate with 2 years diploma in computer science from AICTE recognized institute Fulltime Accountant: B.Com with 50% marks + PGDCA/DCA or equivalent + Tally Software knowledge + Typing in Hindi & English Support Staff (Orderly & Night Watchman): Matric Head Cook: 8th Pass Assistant Cook: 8th Pass

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.ramgarh.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of the application form for Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Recruitment 2026 is 23 July 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications reach by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies for Various Teaching and Support Staff posts in Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Recruitment 2026. These include positions for teachers, accountant, and support staff.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Various Teaching and Support Staff posts is offline. Candidates need to download, fill, and send the application form by post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is a minimum of 21 years and a maximum of 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules for various categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for Various Teaching and Support Staff posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Various Teaching and Support Staff posts ranges from Rs. 5400 to Rs. 15840 per month, depending on the specific post. Detailed salary information is available in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What are the qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post: Graduate with B.Ed/JTET for Teachers, B.Com with computer course for Accountant, Matric for Support Staff, and 8th Pass for Cooks. Specific details are in the eligibility section.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST). Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process for Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh Recruitment 2026 includes a Merit List, Interview, and Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Ramgarh district, www.ramgarh.nic.in. Ensure to fill it accurately and attach all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh?
faq.answer: The official website for Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Residential School Ramgarh recruitment information is www.ramgarh.nic.in. All official updates and application forms will be available there.
